open_gaps.SEC-002: LOW, unchanged. No numPages>1000 cap at the viewer.js loadDocument() boundary; merge.js addFiles() has no cumulative-bytes/page cap. Client-side-only DoS (uploader's own tab) on the 1.6 GiB box. Developer task — fix once at the viewer load boundary to cover all per-page consumers. Per-page consumers that inherit this exposure: text-extract.js (getTextContent loop), bg-borders.js (embedPage loop), and NEW compress.js (rasterize loop iterates 1..numPages). compress.js does add a MAX_PAGE_PX=3000 per-side raster clamp and reuses one canvas, which bounds per-page (not per-document) memory. No new server-side risk.

notes: 34 JS modules (+1 since 08:22 review). Reviewed new module compress.js (TASK-344): client-side PDF size reduction via two strategies — pdf-lib lossless re-save (keeps text) and pdf.js rasterize→JPEG→fresh pdf-lib doc (image-heavy). Source bytes from doc.getData(); renders into its OWN throwaway offscreen canvas (no #pdf-pages geometry risk); picks the smallest candidate that genuinely beats the original and refuses to offer a larger file (honest 0% case). Security posture: filename whitelisted to [a-zA-Z0-9._-] + 180-char cap + '_compressed.pdf'; status/progress via textContent only (no innerHTML); download blob type application/pdf with URL.revokeObjectURL after 1s; resave() uses ignoreEncryption:true (re-save convenience only, not a bypass of any app control); MAX_PAGE_PX=3000 raster clamp + single reused canvas bound per-page memory; no innerHTML/eval/Function/document.write/fetch/XHR/external src. XSS-safe. Full-JS audit across all 34 modules: zero non-clear user-data innerHTML (only grep hit is a comment in search.js), zero eval/Function/document.write, zero fetch/XHR/remote script src. upload.js still enforces ext+MIME+empty+size(50MB)+%PDF- magic with sanitized filenames. Live headers verified: full resource CSP (default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' blob: data:; object-src 'none'; ...), X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff; .mjs served text/javascript+nosniff. Path blocking: .git/config 403, CLAUDE.md 403, scripts/*.sh 403, traversal 404, js/app.js 200, site 200. No hardcoded secrets in js/ (grep hits are split.js page-range parsing + viewer.js render-token, false positives). No failed/invalid SSH auth in last 24h. Disk 44% used, 7.9G free. Stability gate OPEN (0 SYSTEM CRITICAL, 0 FAILED, 0 DONE-unverified).
